chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-112 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of CMA 387/25 21-07-2025 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG and Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, AAG a/w Shoukat Ali Rind, DSP, Kotdiji and Inspector Mashooq on behalf of SDPO, Gambat. **** Pursuant to directions contained in order dated 14.07.2025, learned Law Officers have filed statements on behalf of the SDPOs, Kotdiji and Gambat, taken on record and copies thereof have been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. As per the contents of the said statements, the petitioner is involved in as many as twelve criminal cases registered at different police stations. It is further stated that challans in all such cases have already been submitted before the competent Courts of law and the trial is pending adjudication before the competent Courts of law. In view of the above factual position, no interference is warranted by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction, particularly when the petitioner has an adequate and efficacious remedy available to him under the law by way of application under section 249-A or 265-K CrPC, as the case may be. Accordingly, the petition being misconceived and devoid of merit is hereby dismissed a/w listed application(s). However, the petitioner shall be at liberty to avail appropriate remedy before the concerned trial Court(s) in accordance with law, if he is advised so. JUDGE Ahmad
